title: Teltonika TRB256 Industrial NB-IoT Gateway
description: The TRB256 is an industrial 4G LTE NB-IoT gateway designed to be applied to a broad range of IoT solutions. The device is equipped with multiple WAN interfaces, such as I/Os, RS232, RS485 , and an Ethernet port, additionally boasting dual SIM functionality for continuous connectivity. This industrial-grade gateway also supports the 450 MHz frequency band, offering superior LTE signal penetration compared to standard frequencies, making it an optimal choice for a diverse range of M2M applications CONNECTIVITY - 4G/LTE Cat M1/Cat NB1and NB2/EGPRS 450 MHZ BAND - Greater LTE signal penetration and increased connectivity coverage DUAL SIM - Auto-failover, backup WAN and more switching scenarios INTERFACES - Ethernet, I/Os, and Serial (RS232, RS485) interfaces with 16-pin terminal block Device 16-pin terminal block 1 x hex key QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, GNSS Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps LAN/WAN RF connectors (2) SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps LAN/WAN Serial port RS-232, RS-485 SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 GPS modul Yes Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 3,5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 165 Width [mm] 83 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 74 Hardware CPU Mediatek, 580 Mhz, MIPS 24KEc CPU frequency [MHz] 580 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 16
